note: Provenance-only manifest for the EXP-COV-1 priced relation-extraction asset. Contains NO licensed payload text (no LOCOMO session text, no extracted fact bodies). The cache itself is gitignored EVAL-ONLY on-machine; this manifest lets a GPU downstream re-run verify + reuse it (--resume) at $0 additional spend.

cost.pricing_basis: actual response-usage tokens x a pinned price map (see eval.exp_cov1_common.PRICE_PER_MTOK)

resume_provenance.resilience: atomic checkpoint (temp-file+rename); --resume by key doc_id+model+prompt_version; 429/5xx backoff; window-fit; completeness guard; running $-ledger with hard $20 auto-stop
resume_provenance.real_crash_recovery: extraction was killed mid-run at 229/272 and resumed cleanly to 272 with the ledger continuing from $4.09 (0 re-extraction, 0 double-charge)

reuse_instructions: A GPU downstream re-run reuses this at $0: point exp_cov1_sweep --relation-cache at the extraction_cache path; the sweep's completeness guard confirms 272/272 and NO re-extraction occurs. See EXP-COV-1-downstream-GPU-replan.md.
downstream_status: DEFERRED-to-GPU (CPU embedder .so lacks embed-cuda and stalls; see EXP-COV-1-results.md sec 6). NO coverage->outcome verdict computed (HITL: do not anchor a degraded-stack screening verdict).
